object: HSBC expands AI banking partnership with Google Cloud

subject: 汇丰银行与Google Cloud扩大AI银行
object: HSBC has entered a multi-year partnership with Google Cloud to develop and deploy artificial intelligence tools across its global operations.

subject: 汇丰银行与Google Cloud扩大AI银行
object: HSBC expects the partnership to support more than 200 AI use cases over the next two years. Selected initiatives could each return more than US$100 million through direct revenue gains or efficiency improvements, according to the bank.

subject: AI Hub Co-Design Programmes: Startup Accelerator
object: AI Hub Co-Design Programmes: Startup Accelerator Pilot

subject: AI Hub Co-Design Programmes: Startup Accelerator
object: Startup Accelerator Pilot

subject: AI Hub Co-Design Programmes: Startup Accelerator
object: Strengthening AI foundations is not just important—it's critical for the future of industrial and sustainable development. Without solid AI infrastructure, the potential of technology to revolutionize industries remains untapped. We are thrilled to present the results of our application process for the AI Hub for Sustainable Development Startup Accelerator Pilot. This initiative, part of the co-design of the AI Hub for Sustainable Development, has showcased the wealth of innovation across the African continent, highlighting the immense potential of AI to drive progress.

subject: AI Hub Co-Design Programmes: Startup Accelerator
object: The programme has sparked a wave of creativity, attracting over 300 applications from cutting-edge startups from the nine priority countries of the Italy-Africa Mattei Plan for a six-month co-design accelerator pilot. With innovative solutions in energy, agriculture, health, water, education and training, and infrastructure, these startups are leading the charge towards a smarter, more sustainable world.
